FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any parties, counsel, or other interested persons.

After noting the absences of appearances for the record and the failure of the Trustee to file the required accountings, the Court ordered the Trustee, Karen Rader, and her attorney, Gregory Wilcox, to appear on March 27, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 and to show cause, if any they have, as to why the required accounting has not been timely filed.

Judicial Office: Stella Pantazis, Judge Pro Tempore; Reporter: David Davenport CSR #1694; Bailiff: Deputy Jimmy Peralta; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnson.
